allow: PowerShell($cache = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\electron-builder\\Cache"; if \(Test-Path $cache\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $cache -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "캐시 삭제 시도 완료" } else { "캐시 폴더 없음" }; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\electron-builder\\Cache")

PowerShell($u = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\petchat-dist\\win-unpacked"; if \(Test-Path "$u\\PetChat.exe"\) { "PetChat.exe 있음"; "{0:N1} MB \(폴더 전체\)" -f \(\(Get-ChildItem $u -Recurse | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB\) } else { "win-unpacked 없음" })
